历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings were approximately 13637 → 6447 → 6250 → 47634. From 2021 to 2023, there was a forward trend (increased competition). In 2024, a severe gap occurred (the school line equaled, which is an anomaly; 2025 data is missing). From 2021 to 2024, the provincial science enrollment plan was 22 people each year. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 22 people, consistent with previous years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; not in the top 200 of the Soft Science main ranking, belonging to an industry-specific military medical school. Douyin popularity total ranking 9th (high heat), comprehensive popularity 5.32 million, short video exposure high, reflecting high application attention. No records of this school in reputation files or abnormal submission files, no obvious negative public opinion. The school features clinical medicine, pharmacy, nursing, etc. Although the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this school, as the only naval military medical university, its clinical medicine major has outstanding strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for clinical medicine was 70.19 (recommended), nursing 68.61 (recommended), and the overall application popularity for medical majors is stable. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is 377,900, a significant increase from 173,282 in the Physics Category in 2025, intensifying competition. The school is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a certain appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend in rankings from 2021 to 2023, the 2024 gap being an anomaly that should revert, the 2026 plan being stable, the high Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, and the increase in the total number of candidates in this province, it is predicted that the 2026 ranking will significantly move forward compared to the 2024 gap ranking, returning to a level close to 2021. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12,800, with a range of 12,300 to 13,300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (12,300-13,300), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging) as the main direction, Tier 1 clinical medicine majors can be a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Nursing) as a safety net. This school is a military academy, so attention must be paid to physical examination and political review requirements.
